title: Tea Explore
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b92d4150dfa6170969fc6e6b096ae20a74a9f8c9.png)
**Tea Explore**
The mod will make you feel like a real tea lover. I am sure that eight types of tea will last you for a long time:
- Flower Tea
- Lemongrass Tea
- Glow Berry Tea
- Lazuli Tea
- Darkroot Tea
- Sugarstone Tea
- Sweet Berry Tea
- Ender Tea
- Mountain Tea
- Dark Mountain Tea
- Iris Tea

 You can find a new plant in the desert, windswept hills and in the basalt deltas biome on blackstone.

 I think I've told you enough to interest **you**)
